description_long: This is a large wooden bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a fenced perimeter and a manicured lawn. The main structure features a broad, gabled roof with deep eaves, extensive use of timber, and large glass windows and doors that open onto a covered porch. Adjacent to the main house is a smaller outbuilding with a similar roof style, likely serving as a garage or guest house. A swimming pool is situated between the main house and a covered pavilion, which provides an outdoor seating or dining area. The property is surrounded by a wooden fence and includes paved walkways and a driveway. The overall design emphasizes natural materials and open, communal outdoor spaces.
description: A spacious wooden bungalow with a gabled roof, large windows, a covered porch, a pool, and a separate pavilion, all set within a fenced, landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the covered porch facing the fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the main house, the pool, and the open pavilion structure to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the pool, and the smaller outbuilding to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main house, the porch, and the pavilion with the pool in between.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
